# Frozen regression seed list -- plan Step B1
# (docs/plan-for-dap-spider-callback-and-regression-tests.md)
#
# Hand-picked from crawls/first/*.txt, cross-referenced against
# crawls/first/dap_endpoints.jsonl (a real Stage-2 run's output) and
# crawls/first/notes_from_first_crawl.md. Not a random sample -- each URL
# below earns its place for a specific reason (see comment above it).
#
# This file is deliberately small (10 URLs, not the 20-30 the plan
# estimated) -- once each category below had one or two clean examples,
# additional URLs would just be same-shaped duplicates, not new coverage.
# Comment format matches dap_spider.py's own seed-file parsing (#-prefixed
# lines skipped), so this file can also be fed to dap_spider.py directly for
# a manual live smoke run if wanted.
#
# NOTHING IN THIS FILE HAS BEEN FETCHED YET. Step B2 (one-time capture) is
# the step that actually hits these hosts -- still pending your review of
# this list first.

# --- confirmed true positive: DAP4, Hyrax, clean body+header signal ---
# (dap_endpoints.jsonl: dap_version 4, server "Hyrax/1.17.1-1440-test-deploy")
http://test.opendap.org:8080/opendap/data/nc/fnoc1.nc.dmr

# --- confirmed true positive: real ERDDAP dataset access, DAP2 via XDODS-Server header ---
https://gcoos4.geos.tamu.edu/erddap/tabledap/CAGES_Alabama.graph?longitude,latitude,time&.draw=markers&.marker=5%7C5&.color=0x000000&.colorBar=%7CD%7C%7C%7C%7C&.bgColor=0xffccccff&.click=

# --- confirmed true positive, AND demonstrates the dead strip_query_string finding: ---
# dap_endpoints.jsonl shows probe_url "...&distinct().dds" -- the DAP suffix
# glued on after the query string, not as a real extension. Still worked
# against this (lenient) ERDDAP server.
https://erddap.dataexplorer.oceanobservatories.org/erddap/tabledap/allDatasets.html?accessible,dataStructure,cdm_data_type,class,institution,testOutOfDate&distinct()

# --- confirmed true positive, but SUSPICIOUS: worth checking the real capture ---
# dap_endpoints.jsonl's probe_url for this seed is IDENTICAL to its url --
# no ".dds" ever shows up appended, unlike every other confirmed entry.
# Possible explanations to check once we have the real response in hand:
# a redirect back to the canonical URL, or ERDDAP stamping XDODS-Server on
# non-dataset "index" listing pages regardless of path. If the latter, this
# is a false positive our confirmation logic doesn't catch.
http://apdrc.soest.hawaii.edu/erddap/griddap/index.json?page=1&itemsPerPage=1000

# --- .html-suffixed dodsC URLs (issue #3, fixed: ".html" added to DAP_SUFFIXES) ---
# (notes_from_first_crawl.md lists these under "did not get crawled")
https://pae-paha.pacioos.hawaii.edu/thredds/dodsC/hmrg_bathytopo_50m_mhi.html
https://pae-paha.pacioos.hawaii.edu/thredds/dodsC/neowave_nawiliwili.html

# Removed from the smoke test - this takes too long. jhrg 7/6/26
# https://gcoos5.geos.tamu.edu/thredds/catalog/catalog.html
#
# Maybe this will be faster then the TAMU catalog? jhrg 7/6/26
# https://oceanmodeling.ucsc.edu/thredds/catalog/catalog.xml

# --- same gap, with a query string, to confirm the miss isn't query-string-related ---
http://sgbd.acmad.org:8080/thredds/catalog/ACMAD/WWFD/forecastinservice/ensemble5/2022/202201/20220104/catalog.html?dataset=ACMAD/WWFD/forecastinservice/ensemble5/2022/202201/20220104/ARP20220104_48.png

# --- regex false positive: matches on the literal substring "dap" in the URL, ---
# not a DAP host at all. Already confirmed absent from dap_endpoints.jsonl
# (the real 2026.21 crawl correctly found nothing here).
http://savannah.gnu.org/projects/dap/

# --- regex false positive, different shape: the actual dodsC URL is embedded ---
# in a query PARAMETER of an unrelated IDV-viewer launch page (.jnlp), not
# the page itself. Demonstrates why Stage 1's cheap regex match needs Stage
# 2 verification even on "real" institutional hosts.
http://wcs.hycom.org/thredds/view/idv.jnlp?url=http://tds.hycom.org/thredds/dodsC/ESPC-D-V02/Sssh
